VICTORIA LARSON, COUNSEL WITH LAWYERS COMMITTEE FOR CIVIL RIGHT OF SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA IS PRESENT FOR THE SOLE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING PLAINTIFF ACCESS TO ZOOM APPEARANCES. NO LEGAL ASSISTANCE IF PROVIDED BY VICTORIA LARSON ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE.
